figures.caption: FIGURE 4: pdf of bubble sizes at two streamwise locations, L = x/D = 3.6 and L = 40.0, for two void fractions φ = 0.68% ≈ 0.5% and 2.5% ≈ 2.0%. Each sub-figure has plots for the three SDS concentrations, 0%, 0.01% and 0.03% of CMC.

FIGURE 3: The bubble-size distributions (f (d )) at two streamwise locations, L = x/D = 3.6 and L = 40.0, for two void fractions φ = 0.68% ≈ 0.5% and 2.5% ≈ 2.0%. Each sub-figure has plots for the three SDS concentrations, 0%, 0.01% and 0.03% of CMC.
FIGURE 1: Schematic of the experimental setup; also showing the components of the imaging system, raw and processed back-lit shadowgraph bubble images, and the steps of particle shadow velocimetry.
FIGURE 2: Streamwise evolution of nomralised turbulent kinetic energy (k/V 2) at different φ.
FIGURE 5: Streamwise evolution of mean diameter davg, for three void fractions φ = 0.68% ≈ 0.5%, 1.18% ≈ 1% and 2.5% ≈ 2.0%, and surfactant SDS concentrations of 0%, 0.01% and 0.03% of CMC.
